text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Should I have her focus on getting better or push
through the pain...
choice_data_list: Pain is weakness leaving the body!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decide to focus on getting her injuries treated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> seems to be feeling a little
depressed because she can't get any exercise...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste! I harden my heart and
decide to have <chrname> push
through the pain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she forces herself too hard and her injury
worsens...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the injury is miraculously healed! Practice
goes perfectly!
